title: Cross-branch merge detection and auto-transition
definition_of_done: When working branch merges into main, Trellis detects merge and auto-transitions associated in-progress issues to merged state. Via post-merge hook or trls sync.
outcome: Implemented trls sync command with BranchMergedInto git detection, internal/sync DetectMerges logic, cmd/trellis/sync.go command, and post-merge.sh.template hook. All tests pass.
